title: Johnson & Johnson MedTech Acquires Laminar, Inc.

Johnson & Johnson MedTech acquired Laminar for an upfront payment of $400 million, subject to customary adjustments, with additional potential clinical and regulatory milestone payments in 2024 and beyond.
